case_title: STATES RECOVERY SYSTEMS, INC. VS. JERRY TAK

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATES RECOVERY SYSTEMS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT TAK, JERRY AKA JERRY SUM TAK JEW, INCORRECTLY SUED AS JERRY TAK SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED

COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $1,703.75 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATES RECOVERY SYSTEMS, INC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATES RECOVERY SYSTEMS, INC.
